metadata.description: ARM Template for FSLogix Installation and Configuration via Custom Script Extension
metadata.author: Maia Azure Solutions Architect

metadata.description: Array of VM names to configure FSLogix on
Storage account name for FSLogix profiles
File share name for FSLogix profiles
Storage account key for credential configuration (leave empty if using Azure AD Kerberos)
Use storage account key authentication instead of Azure AD Kerberos
Enable separate Office 365 container for Outlook/Teams
Delete local profile when FSLogix VHD applies
Prevent login if FSLogix cannot attach profile (creates temp profile)
Prevent login if FSLogix fails completely

variables.fslogixInstallScript:
[concat('# FSLogix Installation and Configuration Script
# Generated by ARM Template

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$LogPath = "C:\Temp\FSLogix-Install-$(Get-Date -Format ''yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'').log"

function Write-Log {
    param([string]$Message)
    $timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
    "$timestamp - $Message" | Tee-Object -FilePath $LogPath -Append
}

try {
    # Create temp directory
    New-Item -Path "C:\Temp" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    Write-Log "Starting FSLogix installation and configuration"

    # Download FSLogix
    Write-Log "Downloading FSLogix..."
    [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
    $fslogixUrl = "https://aka.ms/fslogix_download"
    $fslogixZip = "C:\Temp\FSLogix.zip"
    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $fslogixUrl -OutFile $fslogixZip -UseBasicParsing

    # Extract FSLogix
    Write-Log "Extracting FSLogix..."
    Expand-Archive -Path $fslogixZip -DestinationPath "C:\Temp\FSLogix" -Force

    # Install FSLogix
    Write-Log "Installing FSLogix..."
    $installer = "C:\Temp\FSLogix\x64\Release\FSLogixAppsSetup.exe"
    Start-Process -FilePath $installer -ArgumentList "/install /quiet /norestart" -Wait -NoNewWindow

    # Wait for installation to complete
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 10

    # Configure FSLogix Profile Container
    Write-Log "Configuring FSLogix Profile Container..."
    $profilesRegPath = "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\FSLogix\Profiles"
    New-Item -Path $profilesRegPath -Force | Out-Null

    # Core Profile Settings
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "Enabled" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "VHDLocations" -Value "', variables('fslogixSharePath'), '" -Type MultiString
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "SizeInMBs" -Value ', parameters('profileSizeMB'), ' -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "IsDynamic" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "VolumeType" -Value "VHDX" -Type String
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "FlipFlopProfileDirectoryName" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "DeleteLocalProfileWhenVHDShouldApply" -Value ', if(parameters('deleteLocalProfileWhenVHDApplies'), '1', '0'), ' -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "PreventLoginWithTempProfile" -Value ', if(parameters('preventLoginWithTempProfile'), '1', '0'), ' -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "PreventLoginWithFailure" -Value ', if(parameters('preventLoginWithFailure'), '1', '0'), ' -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "LockedRetryCount" -Value 3 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "LockedRetryInterval" -Value 15 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "ProfileType" -Value 0 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "ReAttachIntervalSeconds" -Value 15 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "ReAttachRetryCount" -Value 3 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "AccessNetworkAsComputerObject" -Value 0 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "RebootOnUserLogoff" -Value 0 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "VHDNameMatch" -Value "*" -Type String
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $profilesRegPath -Name "VHDNamePattern" -Value "Profile_%username%" -Type String

    Write-Log "FSLogix Profile Container configured"

    # Configure Office Container (if enabled)
    ', if(parameters('enableOfficeContainer'), 'Write-Log "Configuring FSLogix Office Container..."
    $officeRegPath = "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\FSLogix\ODFC"
    New-Item -Path $officeRegPath -Force | Out-Null
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "Enabled" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "VHDLocations" -Value "', ''), if(parameters('enableOfficeContainer'), variables('fslogixSharePath'), ''), if(parameters('enableOfficeContainer'), '" -Type MultiString
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "SizeInMBs" -Value 30720 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IsDynamic" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "VolumeType" -Value "VHDX" -Type String
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "FlipFlopProfileDirectoryName" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IncludeOfficeActivation" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IncludeOneDrive" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IncludeOutlook" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IncludeTeams" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $officeRegPath -Name "IncludeOutlookPersonalization" -Value 1 -Type DWord
    Write-Log "FSLogix Office Container configured"', ''), '

    # Configure storage account credentials (if using storage key)
    ', if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), 'Write-Log "Configuring storage account credentials..."
    $storageKey = "', ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), parameters('storageAccountKey'), ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), '"
    cmdkey /add:', ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), parameters('storageAccountName'), ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), '.file.core.windows.net /user:Azure\', ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), parameters('storageAccountName'), ''), if(parameters('useStorageAccountKey'), ' /pass:$storageKey
    Write-Log "Storage credentials configured"', ''), '

    # Verify FSLogix services
    Write-Log "Verifying FSLogix services..."
    $services = Get-Service -Name "frxsvc", "frxccds" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    foreach ($svc in $services) {
        Write-Log "Service: $($svc.Name) - Status: $($svc.Status)"
    }

    Write-Log "FSLogix installation and configuration completed successfully!"
    Write-Log "Profile Share: ', variables('fslogixSharePath'), '"
    
    # Cleanup
    Remove-Item -Path "C:\Temp\FSLogix.zip" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Remove-Item -Path "C:\Temp\FSLogix" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

} catch {
    Write-Log "ERROR: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    throw
}
')]
